findings.detail: Read docs/catalog/heartbeats/2026-05-20T17-03-28Z-atlas.json — gi=0.81 mode=green source=kv; 13 anomalies; seed_attempted=true seed_result="200 OK"; sustain_eligible=true; kv_keys present for GI/SIGNAL/MIC/VAULT/ECHO/TRIPWIRE lanes.

GET /api/signals/micro 200 — composite≈0.663 errors=9; ATLAS-listed lanes still error or elevated except Federal Register (themis-federal-register score 0.9 nominal vs ATLAS "elevated"). Embedded micro cycle C-306 vs heartbeat/integrity C-317 (metadata drift).

GET /api/integrity-status 200 — source kv (not mock); global_integrity 0.75 mode=yellow terminal_status=stressed; gi_verified=false; aligns with ATLAS gi=0.81 within expected band vs live micro composite.
GET /api/epicon/candidates 200 — count 0; no candidates, verification skipped (no POST /api/zeus/verify or /api/epicon/publish).

POST /api/vault/attest HTTP 404 (Next.js not-found); quorum_status not returned. Supplemental GET /api/quorum/state 200 — state_machine.quorum_state=substrate_pending, vault_block_state=attested, integrity.source=kv-live, cycle=C-317.
POST /api/agents/journal HTTP 502 — ok=false error="ledger 400: No API base configured for terminal" mirrored_to_kv=false.

recommendation: External signal lanes remain broadly degraded; integrity is KV-backed (not mock). Reconcile micro sweep cycle (C-306) with CURRENT_CYCLE (C-317). Deploy or route POST /api/vault/attest for C-298 quorum registration. Fix terminal ledger API base configuration so agent journal dual-write can succeed.
